zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice Stafford於1391年出生在英國多瑟特胡克時，她的父親Sir Humphrey Stafford II13歲，母親Elizabeth Maltravers13歲。她於1415年與Sir Walter Tailboys , VI baronet kyme在英國達勒姆達勒姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1448年4月24日在英國享年57歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾維斯特波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alice Stafford于1391年出生在英国多瑟特胡克时，她的父亲Sir Humphrey Stafford II13岁，母亲Elizabeth Maltravers13岁。她于1415年与Sir Walter Tailboys , VI baronet kyme在英国達勒姆達勒姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1448年4月24日在英国享年57岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾維斯特波利。

nameMeanings.name: Stafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Stafford (Staffordshire), but occasionally from other places with similar names, such as Stafford House in Ifield (Sussex), possibly East and West Stowford in East Down (Devon), and three minor places in Devon called Stafford, in Dolton, Broadhembury, and Colyton parishes. The places are all named with Old English ford ‘ford’ as the final element, but have different initial elements. The Staffordshire placename has Old English stæth ‘river bank, shore’; Stafford in Colyton (Devon) has Old English stān ‘stone, rock’; the Sussex placename has Old English stēor ‘steer, bullock’; East and West Stowford (Devon) have Old English stæf ‘staff, stave, rod’; Stafford in Dolton and Stafford in Broadhembury (Devon) may have Old English stæth, stān, or stæf.

variants.name: Stocker
meanings: German and Swiss German (also Stöcker): topographic name for someone living by a tree stump (see Stock 3) or an occupational name for a tree cutter, from Middle High German stocken ‘to clear land’.
German and Swiss German (also Stöcker); Dutch: occupational name from Middle High German, Middle Dutch stocker ‘jailer’.

English: occupational name from Middle English stokker ‘one who sells stockfish’ (fish dried in the air without salt). This was the usual source of the name in medieval London, where a bylaw of 1419 stated that no stokker should board a ship to buy fish (presumably in order to forestall the market).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice Stafford was born in 1391, in Hooke, Dorset, England, her father, Sir Humphrey Stafford II, was 13 and her mother, Elizabeth Maltravers, was 13. She married Sir Walter Tailboys , VI baronet kyme in 1415, in Durham, Durham, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 24 April 1448, in England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Westbury, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice Stafford est née en 1391, à Hooke, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Sir Humphrey Stafford II, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Maltravers, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Walter Tailboys , VI baronet kyme en 1415, à Durham, Durham, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 avril 1448, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Westbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Alice Stafford 1391 in Hooke, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Humphrey Stafford II 13 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Maltravers 13. Sie hat 1415 in Durham, Durham, England Sir Walter Tailboys , VI baronet kyme geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 24. April 1448 im Alter von 57 Jahren in England und wurde in Westbury, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Stafford è nata il nel 1391 nel Hooke, Dorset, England, sua padre, Sir Humphrey Stafford II, aveva 13 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Maltravers, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Sir Walter Tailboys , VI baronet kyme nel 1415, nel Durham, Durham, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 24 aprile 1448, nel England, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Westbury, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Staffordが1391年にイギリスドールセトホーオクで生まれた時，父Sir Humphrey Stafford IIは13歳，母Elizabeth Maltraversは13歳であった。1415年にイギリスダルハムダルハムでSir Walter Tailboys , VI baronet kymeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1448年4月24日にイギリスで57歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアウエストブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Stafford(이)가 1391년 영국 도르세트 훅에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Humphrey Stafford II(은)는 13세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Maltravers(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1415년 영국 뒤람 뒤람에서 Sir Walter Tailboys , VI baronet kyme(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1448년 4월 24일 영국에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 웨스트버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Stafford nasceu em 1391, em Hooke, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Humphrey Stafford II, tinha 13 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Maltravers, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Walter Tailboys , VI baronet kyme em 1415, em Durham, Durham, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 24 de abril de 1448, em Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Westbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice Stafford родилась в 1391 г. в местности хук, дорсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Humphrey Stafford II было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Maltravers, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Walter Tailboys , VI baronet kyme в 1415 г. в местности дурам, дурам, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 24 апреля 1448 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности вестбури, уилцхир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Alice Stafford nació en 1391, en Hooke, Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Humphrey Stafford II, tenía 13 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Maltravers, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Sir Walter Tailboys , VI baronet kyme en 1415, en Durham, Durham, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 24 de abril de 1448, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en Westbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
